title: Log in and access dashboard
description: Verifies an existing user can sign in with email and password and land on the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Generate resume with selected achievements and save to library
description: Verifies a job seeker can select achievements, generate a resume, make an inline edit, and save the document to the library successfully.

steps.description: Select at least one achievement in the achievement selector
Edit the generated resume content inline by adding a short unique phrase
Save the resume to the document library
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Submit onboarding intake and enter processing screen
description: Verifies submitting the final onboarding step transitions into the full-screen processing experience.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Complete onboarding steps 1–3 with valid values and advance to the upload step
Upload a valid resume file in the resume upload control
Verify the onboarding processing screen is displayed

title: Analyse a pasted job description and see match score with ranked achievements
description: Verifies the user can analyse a job description from the dashboard and see a match score plus ranked achievements.

steps.description: Fill a realistic job description into the match engine job description field
Verify an overall match score is displayed
Verify ranked achievements with strength labels are displayed

title: Run onboarding processing until report completes
description: Verifies the processing screen continues until completion and the diagnostic report is displayed on the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Complete onboarding steps 1–4 with a valid resume upload and submit intake to enter processing
Wait for the processing flow to finish
Verify a diagnostic report is displayed on the dashboard

title: Complete onboarding steps 1–3 and reach resume upload step
description: Verifies a first-time user can progress through onboarding steps 1–3 by providing required inputs and arrive at the final upload step.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Proceed from the onboarding welcome screen
Fill a target role into the target role field
Fill a target city into the target city field
Fill a valid job search timeline into the timeline field
Fill a valid applications count into the applications count field
Select at least one channel used
Fill a valid response pattern into the response pattern field
Fill a perceived blocker description into the perceived blocker field
Verify the resume upload step is displayed

title: View application pipeline counts on dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated job seeker can access the dashboard and see application counts grouped by status.

steps.description: Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify application counts grouped by status are displayed

title: Generate cover letter, run personalisation, adjust tone, and save
description: Verifies a job seeker can generate a cover letter, run the personalisation check, rewrite tone, and save the final document to the library.

steps.description: Run the cover letter personalisation check
Adjust tone using the tone rewrite tool
Save the cover letter to the document library
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Sign up and start onboarding
description: Verifies a new user can create an account with email and password and is taken into the onboarding intake flow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a unique new email value
Fill in the password field with a valid password value
Verify the onboarding intake is displayed

title: Open workspace for an analysed job and see it preloaded
description: Verifies the user can open the application workspace from match results and the selected job is preloaded.

steps.description: Fill a realistic job description into the match engine job description field
Open the matched job in the application workspace
Verify the application workspace is displayed
Verify the analysed job is shown as the active job context in the workspace

title: Generate resume and export as DOCX from preview
description: Verifies a job seeker can generate a resume, preview it, and export it as a DOCX successfully.

steps.description: Select at least one achievement in the achievement selector
Verify a DOCX export action completes successfully

title: Advance a job through pipeline and see funnel update
description: Verifies a job seeker can advance an application status and the job relocates to the next stage while the pipeline funnel updates accordingly.

steps.description: Create a new application from the tracker
Open the newly created job card
Advance the application status using the status control
Verify the application appears in the next pipeline stage

title: Save an analysed job to the application tracker
description: Verifies the user can save an analysed job from the match engine and then find it in the tracker list.

steps.description: Fill a realistic job description into the match engine job description field
Save the matched job to the tracker
Click the link to open the application tracker
Verify the newly saved job appears in the application list

title: Export generated document as PDF from preview
description: Verifies a job seeker can generate a document, preview it, and export it as a PDF successfully.

steps.description: Verify a PDF export action completes successfully

title: Set closing date, generate follow-up email, and copy output
description: Verifies a job seeker can set a closing date that appears in upcoming deadlines, generate a follow-up email draft, and copy it successfully.

steps.description: Create a new application from the tracker
Open the newly created job card
Set a valid closing date for the job
Generate a follow-up email draft for the job
Verify the job is listed in the upcoming deadlines area

title: Require resume before submitting onboarding intake
description: Verifies the onboarding intake cannot be submitted without a resume and shows an inline validation error until a resume is provided.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Complete onboarding steps 1–3 with valid values and advance to the upload step
Attempt to submit the intake without uploading a resume
Verify a resume-required validation error is visible

title: Filter applications by status and sort by match score
description: Verifies a job seeker can filter applications by status and sort results by match score to find relevant jobs.

steps.description: Filter applications by a non-default status
Verify only applications matching the selected status are displayed

title: Generate selection criteria, edit, and save to library
description: Verifies a job seeker can generate selection criteria responses, edit a response inline, and save the document to the library.

steps.description: Edit one generated response inline by adding a short unique phrase
Save the selection criteria document to the document library
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Open a deadline item from dashboard to view application details in tracker
description: Verifies the user can open an upcoming deadline item from the dashboard and land in the tracker viewing the related application.

steps.description: Click a deadline item in the upcoming deadlines list
Verify the tracker view opens showing a specific application’s details

title: Expand and collapse a diagnostic report section and submit relevance feedback
description: Verifies the user can expand/collapse a diagnostic report section and submit a relevance rating.

steps.description: Scroll to the diagnostic report panel on the dashboard
Select a relevance rating for the section
Verify the selected relevance feedback state is shown for that section

title: Preview a document in markdown
description: Verifies a user can open a document from the library and view its content rendered as a markdown preview.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Document Library
Click a document from the list to open its preview
Verify a markdown document preview is displayed

title: Block sign-in with invalid credentials
description: Verifies the app prevents sign-in with invalid email/password and shows an authentication error state without navigating to the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid.user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Verify an authentication error is visible

title: Analyse a job description and view extracted metadata and AU-specific flags
description: Verifies the user can run match analysis and see extracted role/company metadata and Australian-specific flags.

steps.description: Fill a realistic job description into the match engine job description field
Verify extracted job metadata is displayed

title: Add achievement and link it to an experience entry
description: Verifies a user can create a new achievement and associate it with a selected work experience entry.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Profile Bank
Fill "Achievement UI Test" into the achievement title field
Fill "Delivered a measurable result in a project" into the achievement description field
Fill "15%" into the achievement metrics field
Select a work experience entry to link the achievement to
Verify an achievement titled "Achievement UI Test" is visible in the achievement list

title: Proceed from diagnostic report islands into the dashboard apply experience
description: Verifies the user can progress through the diagnostic report islands and reach the main dashboard ready to start applying.

steps.description: Scroll through the diagnostic report islands sequentially
Proceed from the report experience into the dashboard
Verify the dashboard match engine area is displayed

title: View documents grouped by recency
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Document Library and see documents organized into recency groups.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Document Library
Verify document groups by recency are displayed

title: Retry processing from processing screen
description: Verifies the user can trigger the retry action on the processing screen and the processing state resumes.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Complete onboarding steps 1–4 with a valid resume upload and submit intake to enter processing
Wait for the retry option to be available
Verify the processing screen indicates processing has resumed

title: Edit and save professional summary
description: Verifies an authenticated job seeker can update their professional summary and see the updated content persisted on the Profile Bank page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Profile Bank
Enter edit mode for the professional summary
Fill "Updated summary for UI test" into the professional summary field
Verify the professional summary displays "Updated summary for UI test"

title: Delete a document with confirmation
description: Verifies a user can delete a document from the Document Library after confirming and that it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Application Workspace
Select a document type to generate
Wait for the generated document content to appear
Save the generated document to the Document Library
Click the navigation link to open the Document Library
Locate the most recently created document in the list
Verify the deleted document is not present in the document list

title: Prevent generation when no achievements are selected
description: Verifies the workspace blocks generation when required achievement selection is missing and shows a validation prompt.

steps.description: Ensure no achievements are selected in the achievement selector
Verify a selection validation error is visible

title: Polish an achievement wording via AI and keep changes
description: Verifies a user can request AI polishing for an achievement and then save the updated wording in the Profile Bank.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Profile Bank
Fill "Polish Source" into the achievement title field
Fill "Did stuff to help the team" into the achievement description field
Trigger AI polish for the "Polish Source" achievement
Wait for the polishing result to appear
Verify the "Polish Source" achievement shows updated polished content

title: Reject sign-up with invalid email format
description: Verifies the sign-up form enforces basic email format validation and does not proceed when the email is invalid.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with a valid password value
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Handle low match score warning modal via continue path
description: Verifies that when the match score is low, a warning modal appears and continuing allows the user to proceed to the next action.

steps.description: Fill a job description that is clearly unrelated to the user’s profile into the match engine job description field
Continue from the low match-score warning modal
Save the matched job to the tracker
Verify a save confirmation is visible
Verify the job is now tracked as saved in the UI state

title: Filter documents by type and search by title
description: Verifies a user can narrow the document list by selecting a document type and searching by title.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Document Library
Fill "Test" into the document search field
Verify the document list updates to match the selected type and search term

title: Submit post-generation feedback with rating and comment
description: Verifies a job seeker can rate a generated document, optionally indicate the weakest section, submit feedback, and see confirmation it was saved.

steps.description: Select a star rating from 1 to 5 in the feedback UI
Fill a short comment into the feedback comment field
Verify a feedback-saved confirmation is visible

title: Reject submit with missing required login fields
description: Verifies the login form requires email and password and does not submit when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Delete an achievement with confirmation
description: Verifies a user can delete an achievement and it is removed from the Profile Bank list after confirming deletion.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Profile Bank
Fill "Delete Me" into the achievement title field
Fill "Temporary achievement for deletion" into the achievement description field
Initiate deletion for the "Delete Me" achievement
Verify the achievement titled "Delete Me" is not present in the achievement list

title: Regenerate identity card and see refreshed output
description: Verifies a user can regenerate their identity card and see identity card content displayed in the Profile Bank.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Profile Bank
Verify identity card content is displayed

title: Browse email templates by category
description: Verifies a user can open the Email Templates Library and see templates grouped into categories for browsing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Email Templates Library
Verify email templates are displayed grouped by category

title: Cancel deletion of an achievement
description: Verifies a user can cancel an achievement deletion and the achievement remains visible in the Profile Bank.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Profile Bank
Fill "Keep Me" into the achievement title field
Fill "Temporary achievement to verify cancel path" into the achievement description field
Initiate deletion for the "Keep Me" achievement
Verify an achievement titled "Keep Me" is visible in the achievement list

title: Cancel deletion of a document
description: Verifies a user can cancel a document deletion and the document remains available in the Document Library.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Application Workspace
Select a document type to generate
Wait for the generated document content to appear
Save the generated document to the Document Library
Click the navigation link to open the Document Library
Locate the most recently created document in the list
Verify the document remains present in the document list

title: Expand a template to view full content and personalization tips
description: Verifies a user can expand an email template card to view the full template content and its personalization guidance.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open the Email Templates Library
Verify the expanded template shows full email content and personalization tips

title: Import resume to backfill profile data
description: Verifies the resume importer can be opened and a resume can be selected to start the backfill process from the Profile Bank.
